query:
SELECT ifa.id, ifa.questionId, ifa.fileName, ifa.fileUrl, ifa.uploadedBy, ifa.createdAt 
FROM intakeFileAttachments ifa 
JOIN organizations o ON o.id = ifa.organizationId 
WHERE o.slug = 'RMCA' 
ORDER BY ifa.createdAt DESC;
command:
